description: Style NoteA well fitting formal shirt is an essential no woman can do without. This full sleeved shirt from allen solly is our answer to this need. Pair it with a pencil skirt and kitten heels for a day at the office.Product DetailsGrey and white striped formal shirt with spread collar, buttoned placket, long sleeves with cuff, yoke at back, curved hem with stitched tab, branding at front left bottom hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash with like coloursDo not bleachWarm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8'' chest 33'') is wearing a size M
